title: schnella reflexa
intro: Schnella reflexa, also known as the reflexed schnella or reflexed schnellia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. The medicinal properties of Schnella reflexa include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to the presence of certain bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Schnella reflexa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Schnella reflexa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
